title: Title
doc_html:
PART XII.  LOUISIANA HAZARDOUS AEROSOL ACT

§1057.  Title

This Part may be cited as the "State Hazardous Aerosol Act."

Added by Acts 1975, No. 590, §1, eff. July 17, 1975.

PART XII.  LOUISIANA HAZARDOUS AEROSOL ACT
§1057.  Title
This Part may be cited as the "State Hazardous Aerosol Act."
Added by Acts 1975, No. 590, §1, eff. July 17, 1975.
